topics.name: Counting to 20
objectives: Count forward to 20 starting at any number
Match a count to a group of objects

topics.name: Counting to 120
objectives: Count forward to 120 from any starting number
Read and write numerals to 120

topics.name: Skip Counting by 2s, 5s, and 10s
objectives: Skip count by 2s, 5s, and 10s
Recognize skip-counting patterns

topics.name: Comparing Two-Digit Numbers
objectives: Compare two two-digit numbers using greater than, less than, and equal to
Use the symbols >, <, and =

topics.name: Ordering Numbers to 100
objectives: Order a set of numbers from least to greatest
Find one more and one less than a number

topics.name: Addition within 10
objectives: Add two numbers with sums to 10
Use counting on to add

topics.name: Making Ten
objectives: Find pairs of numbers that make 10
Use make-a-ten to add

topics.name: Addition within 20
objectives: Add two numbers with sums to 20
Use strategies like make-a-ten and doubles

topics.name: Adding Three Numbers
objectives: Add three whole numbers with a sum within 20
Group addends to add efficiently

topics.name: Subtraction within 10
objectives: Subtract within 10
Use counting back to subtract

topics.name: Subtraction within 20
objectives: Subtract within 20
Use the relationship between addition and subtraction

topics.name: Fact Families
objectives: Write related addition and subtraction facts
Use fact families to solve for an unknown

topics.name: Addition and Subtraction Word Problems
objectives: Solve word problems within 20 using addition and subtraction
Find the unknown in any position

topics.name: Tens and Ones
objectives: Understand a two-digit number as tens and ones
Represent numbers with base-ten blocks

topics.name: Ten More and Ten Less
objectives: Find 10 more and 10 less than a two-digit number without counting

topics.name: Adding a Two-Digit and a One-Digit Number
objectives: Add within 100 using place value
Compose a ten when needed

topics.name: Adding Multiples of Ten
objectives: Add a two-digit number and a multiple of ten

topics.name: Comparing and Ordering Lengths
objectives: Order three objects by length
Compare lengths indirectly using a third object

topics.name: Telling Time to the Hour and Half-Hour
objectives: Tell and write time to the hour and half-hour using analog and digital clocks

topics.name: Picture Graphs and Tally Charts
objectives: Organize data into categories
Ask and answer questions about a picture graph

topics.name: Two-Dimensional Shapes
objectives: Identify and describe circles, triangles, squares, and rectangles by their attributes

topics.name: Three-Dimensional Shapes
objectives: Identify cubes, spheres, cones, and cylinders
Distinguish defining attributes from non-defining ones

topics.name: Halves and Fourths
objectives: Partition circles and rectangles into two and four equal shares
Use the words halves and fourths

topics.name: Hundreds, Tens, and Ones
objectives: Understand a three-digit number as hundreds, tens, and ones
Model numbers with base-ten blocks

topics.name: Counting within 1000
objectives: Count within 1000
Skip count by 5s, 10s, and 100s

topics.name: Reading and Writing Numbers to 1000
objectives: Read and write numbers to 1000 in standard, word, and expanded form

topics.name: Comparing Three-Digit Numbers
objectives: Compare three-digit numbers using >, <, and =
Reason using hundreds, tens, and ones

topics.name: Addition and Subtraction Facts Fluency
objectives: Fluently add and subtract within 20 from memory

topics.name: Two-Digit Addition with Regrouping
objectives: Add two-digit numbers using regrouping
Add up to four two-digit numbers

topics.name: Two-Digit Subtraction with Regrouping
objectives: Subtract two-digit numbers using regrouping

topics.name: Adding and Subtracting within 1000
objectives: Add and subtract within 1000 using place value and properties

topics.name: Two-Step Word Problems
objectives: Solve one- and two-step word problems within 100
Use a variable for the unknown

topics.name: Measuring Length with Units
objectives: Measure length using rulers and standard units
Compare lengths and find the difference

topics.name: Telling Time to Five Minutes
objectives: Tell and write time to the nearest five minutes
Use a.m. and p.m.

topics.name: Counting Money
objectives: Count coins and dollar bills
Solve word problems involving money

topics.name: Line Plots and Bar Graphs
objectives: Create and read picture graphs, bar graphs, and line plots

topics.name: Even and Odd Numbers
objectives: Tell whether a group of objects is even or odd
Write an even number as a sum of two equal addends

topics.name: Arrays and Repeated Addition
objectives: Use arrays to find a total
Write a repeated-addition equation for an array

topics.name: Two- and Three-Dimensional Shapes
objectives: Recognize and draw shapes by their attributes such as number of sides and angles

topics.name: Partitioning Shapes into Equal Shares
objectives: Partition shapes into halves, thirds, and fourths
Describe the whole as two, three, or four equal shares

topics.name: Place Value to Thousands
objectives: Read, write, and represent numbers to the thousands place

topics.name: Rounding to the Nearest 10 and 100
objectives: Round whole numbers to the nearest 10 and 100 using place value

topics.name: Adding and Subtracting within 1000
objectives: Fluently add and subtract within 1000 using strategies and the standard algorithm

topics.name: Understanding Multiplication
objectives: Interpret products as equal groups and arrays
Write multiplication equations

topics.name: Multiplication Facts to 100
objectives: Fluently multiply within 100
Know products of one-digit numbers from memory

topics.name: Understanding Division
objectives: Interpret division as equal sharing and equal grouping

topics.name: Division Facts
objectives: Fluently divide within 100 using the relationship to multiplication

topics.name: Relating Multiplication and Division
objectives: Use multiplication and division as inverse operations
Find an unknown factor

topics.name: Properties of Multiplication
objectives: Apply the commutative, associative, and distributive properties

topics.name: Multiplying by Multiples of Ten
objectives: Multiply one-digit numbers by multiples of ten using place value

topics.name: Multiplication and Division Word Problems
objectives: Solve two-step word problems using the four operations

topics.name: Understanding Fractions
objectives: Understand a fraction as a part of a whole partitioned into equal parts

topics.name: Fractions on a Number Line
objectives: Represent and locate fractions on a number line

topics.name: Equivalent Fractions
objectives: Recognize and generate simple equivalent fractions
Explain why two fractions are equal

topics.name: Comparing Fractions
objectives: Compare fractions with the same numerator or the same denominator
Use the symbols >, <, and =

topics.name: Telling Time and Elapsed Time
objectives: Tell time to the minute
Solve problems involving elapsed time

topics.name: Mass and Liquid Volume
objectives: Measure and estimate mass and liquid volume in metric units
Solve one-step problems involving these measures

topics.name: Area
objectives: Measure area by counting unit squares
Relate area to multiplication

topics.name: Perimeter
objectives: Find the perimeter of polygons
Find an unknown side length given the perimeter

topics.name: Scaled Graphs and Line Plots
objectives: Draw and read scaled picture graphs and bar graphs
Make line plots with halves and fourths

topics.name: Classifying Shapes
objectives: Classify quadrilaterals by their attributes
Recognize shared attributes across categories

topics.name: Partitioning Shapes into Equal Areas
objectives: Partition shapes into equal areas
Express the area of each part as a unit fraction of the whole
